detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use dsitxss driver.

sect1.title: xdsitxss_selftest_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XDsitxss driver directly. This example performs the basic selftest to test the sub-core functions.

sect1.title: xdsitxss_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XDsitxss driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver with interrupts.

sect1.title: xdsitxss_video_test_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XDsitxss driver directly. This example performs the video test on the dsitxss driver.
